items.name: US M12 Flak Jacket / Flak Vest (Olive)
items.description:
Quick Color corrected version, Old one was too saturated but both will remain for sale

Aluminum plates and early ballistic-rated polymer nylon strung together into the first real comfortable light weight protective body armor for troops on the ground. Used very late in WW2 and into the korean war by the United states

Modeled and textured by Lulzisback33
